The black fabric below the frill should form a natural curved surface over the torso with mild tension and visible woven texture. Because Hayoon leans slightly, create one shallow vertical fold on one side of the waist instead of mirrored folds.

Both shoulder straps must remain equal in width, visibly connected to the dress and positioned over the centers of the shoulders. They must not twist, duplicate, disappear into the hair or move toward the neck and underarms.

The dark-brown hair and black dress should remain distinguishable through separate textures, edge light and tonal values.

Do not include the handbag or chair. Jewellery should be absent or limited to tiny silver stud earrings that do not draw attention away from the face.

## 8) Facial Expression

Hayoon’s upper eyelids rest slightly lower than in a conventional bright beauty portrait, but she must not appear sleepy.

Maintain subtle natural firmness in the lower eyelids and aegyo-sal so that her gaze remains clear and emotionally active. Keep the forehead and the space between the eyebrows completely relaxed.

Her lips touch lightly with a minute opening at the center. The mouth corners remain neutral, and the cheeks and jaw stay relaxed.

Her gaze contains a faint unresolved concentration. She should look as though she has almost returned to the present moment but has not completely finished her thought.

She is not smiling, seducing the viewer, crying or waiting dramatically for another person. Avoid a cosmetics-campaign smile, vacant fashion expression or exaggerated melancholic gaze.

## 9) Lighting, Skin Tone and Beauty Atmosphere

Use a large diffused window source entering from camera-left at approximately 35–40°, positioned about 30cm above Hayoon’s eye level.

The key light should prioritize the eyes and facial planes. Create soft highlights along the left forehead, upper eyelid, cheekbone, nose bridge, nose tip, upper lip line, lower lip center, jawline, collarbone and shoulder.

Place soft, consistent catchlights in both eyes. The catchlights should match the size and direction of the unseen window and must not resemble circular studio ring lights.

Allow a thin natural edge of light along the outer hair contour, lower jaw and left shoulder. Use weak warm reflection from the cream wall on camera-right to retain detail in the right cheek, jaw, neck and shoulder.

Allow the oak surface to return a faint honey-brown reflection onto the underside of the touching fingers. Do not use a strong reflector beneath the face, as the natural structure below the chin and along both sides of the neck must remain visible.

The 10:50 a.m. window light should make the ivory frill the brightest garment element while keeping Hayoon’s eyes and face as the primary focus.

Avoid clipped skin highlights, flat frontal lighting, overly bright under-eye fill and artificial cosmetics-advertising glow.

## 10) Essential Beauty Direction and Physical Anchors

Hayoon’s eyes, facial structure, skin texture, lips and refined natural makeup must remain the dominant elements of the portrait.

The ivory frill and thin black straps should frame the skin and collarbones without becoming more visually important than her expression. Clearly separate the three material stages of luminous skin, textured ivory fabric and matte black dress.

The almost-direct gaze must remain slightly offset from the lens. The fingertip contact must appear physically real and emotionally incidental rather than posed.

Maintain realistic frill thickness, natural strap tension, believable shaping across the bust and waist, subtle fabric compression, accurate fingertip contact, small contact shadows and coherent wrist alignment.

Preserve natural hair gravity, a physically connected bun and scrunchie, coherent oak perspective, realistic facial anatomy and progressive optical depth.

## 11) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark reading “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner. Use Helvetica Neue in a thin or light weight with white semi-transparent lettering.

The watermark should appear clean, minimal and softly integrated into the photograph. Keep it away from Hayoon’s touching hand, dress and the fingertip contact area.

## 12) Negative Prompt

Avoid plastic skin, beauty-filter face, excessively airbrushed beauty skin, waxy complexion, porcelain-plastic finish, oversized eyes, doll-like facial proportions, unnaturally enlarged irises, mismatched eyes, duplicated catchlights, ring-light catchlights, excessive makeup, heavy contouring, false eyelashes dominating the eyes, glossy cosmetics-advertising skin, malformed hands, fused fingers, extra fingers, missing fingers, duplicated fingers, distorted anatomy, clipped skin highlights, artificial HDR, CGI rendering, over-sharpening, fingertips penetrating the table, fingertips floating above the table, palm pressed flat against the surface, duplicated right hand, fused index and middle fingers, severely bent wrist, console line crossing the neck or jaw, duplicated straps, missing straps, painted-on frill, paper-thin frill, floating scrunchie, duplicated bun, hair completely merging with the dress, exact direct advertising eye contact, seductive expression, perfume campaign pose, visible handbag, visible chair and cropped fingertip contact.

cuts.title: 아침 피드 메인 히어로
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic 35mm analog travel-fashion portrait inspired by Fujifilm Pro 400H.

Cool airy greens, a clean blue summer sky, soft pastel color, natural skin tone, gentle contrast, smooth highlight rolloff, and subtle fine film grain. The image feels fresh, graceful, quietly exciting, and emotionally spacious without appearing faded, gray, or underexposed.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun is walking across a green hill in Biei when she hears someone softly call her name. She gently turns her face toward the camera while her body remains angled along the direction of her walk.

Her white dress and long black hair move lightly in the cool summer breeze. The image captures the first moment of a Hokkaido journey: clear air, quiet anticipation, and the feeling that summer has finally begun.

Jieun must remain the immediate visual focus, with her face and white dress recognized before the landscape.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

A gently rolling green hill in Biei, Hokkaido, during a clear summer morning between 8:00 and 10:00 AM.

Bright natural sunlight, a pleasant cool breeze, clean transparent air, a vivid blue sky, and a few soft white clouds.

No rain, no umbrella, no gray sky, no fog, no tourists, no vehicles, no road signs, no fences, and no visible infrastructure.

## 4) Background and Props

- Layered pale-green and mint-green hills
- One solitary tree standing far behind Jieun near her shoulder line
- Fine meadow grass moving in the wind
- Clean open sky occupying approximately 25–30% of the frame
- No handheld props
- No bag, camera, flowers, jewelry, or travel accessories

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing

Vertical 3:4 composition optimized for a social-media editorial feed.

A knee-below medium-long portrait, with Jieun occupying approximately 70% of the image height.

Eye-level or slightly low camera position, photographed with a natural 50mm lens perspective.

Place Jieun slightly away from the center on a rule-of-thirds point. Keep enough environmental detail to clearly identify the Biei landscape, but do not make her small in the frame.

Moderate depth of field with recognizable hills and tree. No extreme background blur.

Include her head, hands, dress, knees, and lower legs naturally without awkward cropping.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, smooth porcelain skin, large round almond-shaped eyes with subtle double eyelids, a calm and delicate gaze, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark near one eye.

Long straight black hair with natural volume and thin airy see-through bangs. Petite, feminine, healthy, anatomically realistic proportions with a slim waist and delicate body lines.

Outfit:
A pure white or bright ivory cotton maxi dress with lightly puffed short sleeves, a minimal fitted waist, and a generously flowing skirt. White or ivory flat shoes.

Makeup:
Thin cloud-like semi-matte skin, rosy beige and soft brown eyes, gently defined lashes, cool rose blush, and a clear rose-pink glow lip.

Pose:
Her body is turned approximately 30 degrees to the side while her face turns naturally toward the camera. One hand lightly gathers a small section of the dress skirt; the other hangs comfortably beside her.

Expression:
A small, natural smile with clear visible eyes. Fresh, calm, and quietly excited rather than posed or commercial.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Soft morning sunlight falls evenly across her face and dress.

The white dress must separate clearly from the green hill. Preserve clean blue sky, cool mint greens, realistic skin color, and fine facial detail.

No harsh midday shadows, no blown highlights, no HDR, no excessive micro-contrast, no milky haze, and no desaturated gray cast.

## 8) Key Direction Points

The image must instantly communicate:

- Jieun’s recognizable face
- A clean white summer dress
- A bright green Biei hill
- A clear Hokkaido summer sky
- A gentle feeling of beginning a journey

Create a highly saveable, shareable summer travel-fashion hero image for a female audience.

Avoid generic AI beauty, plastic skin, distorted hands, extra fingers, cropped feet, hidden facial features, oversized landscape framing, or an advertisement-like stare.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight.

The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 초원길을 걷는 여행자
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic 35mm analog full-body travel portrait inspired by Fujifilm Pro 400H.

Cool pastel greens, clean blue sky, soft natural daylight, delicate skin tone, restrained contrast, subtle fine grain, and refreshing summer clarity. The mood is light, hopeful, and quietly liberating.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun slowly walks toward the camera along a narrow path through a green meadow in Biei.

There are no props. The story is carried by her natural stride, the movement of her white cotton dress, the soft shine of her black hair, and the open summer landscape around her.

The scene should feel like an authentic moment observed during the first morning of a journey, not a rehearsed runway walk.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

A narrow meadow path crossing a gently sloped green hill in Biei, Hokkaido.

Clear summer morning, blue sky, a few clean white clouds, soft sunlight, and a cool breeze.

The ground is dry and comfortable for walking.

No rain, umbrellas, mud, tourists, roads, signs, power lines, buildings, vehicles, fences, or farm machinery.

## 4) Background and Props

- Narrow natural meadow path used as a leading line
- Rolling pale-green hills
- Fine summer grass moving lightly
- Clear sky occupying approximately 20–25% of the frame
- No props
- No handbag, camera, hat, bouquet, or jewelry

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing

Vertical 3:4 full-body composition.

Jieun occupies approximately 60% of the image height.

Photograph from waist height or slightly lower using a natural 50mm perspective.

Show her entire body from the top of her head to the soles of both shoes. Maintain comfortable space above her hair and beneath her feet.

Use the narrow path as a leading line toward Jieun. Keep her face recognizable and properly exposed.

Avoid an extreme wide shot, tiny subject, cropped ankles, excessive foreground grass, or strong background blur.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, smooth porcelain skin, large round almond-shaped eyes with subtle double eyelids, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark near one eye.

Long straight black hair with natural volume and thin see-through bangs. Petite, elegant, naturally feminine, and anatomically realistic Korean proportions.

Outfit:
A pure white or bright ivory cotton maxi dress with soft short sleeves, a naturally defined waist, and a loose skirt moving gently in the breeze. White or ivory flat shoes.

Makeup:
Clean semi-matte cloud skin, rosy-beige eyes, soft brown definition, cool rose blush, and a fresh rose-pink lip.

Pose:
A natural small walking stride. One hand lightly brushes the side seam of her dress while the opposite arm moves freely with her step.

Gaze:
She looks slightly beside the direction of travel rather than directly into the lens.

Expression:
A gentle, barely visible smile that suggests the quiet excitement of a first travel day.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use clear but soft morning sunlight.

Allow subtle sunlight to catch the edges of her black hair and moving dress without creating an artificial halo.

Maintain bright, clean separation among the white dress, green grass, and blue sky.

No gray haze, overexposed dress, crushed shadows, orange skin, dramatic cinematic darkness, or excessive saturation.

## 8) Key Direction Points

The full-body silhouette and natural movement must remain elegant and anatomically correct.

The image should make the viewer imagine stepping into the meadow and walking through the cool air.

Prioritize Jieun’s face, outfit, realistic walking posture, complete feet, and the visual rhythm of the path.

Avoid runway posture, exaggerated leg extension, stiff arms, floating fabric, malformed shoes, duplicate limbs, or scenery that overwhelms the model.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight.

The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 바람을 느끼는 순간
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic 35mm analog editorial portrait inspired by Fujifilm Pro 400H.

Fresh mint greens, clean blue sky, soft white cotton, luminous natural skin, restrained pastel color, low-to-moderate contrast, and delicate fine grain.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun pauses on the Biei hillside and lifts one hand to tuck windblown hair behind her ear.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

A green hillside in Biei, Hokkaido, during a bright and cool summer morning.

Clear blue sky, a few white clouds, soft sunlight, and a natural breeze.

## 4) Background and Props

- A single distant tree behind and away from her face
- Minimal meadow grass along the lower edge
- Clean open space in the direction of her gaze
- No handheld props or accessories

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing

Vertical 3:4 thigh-up medium portrait.

Jieun occupies approximately 75% of the image height.

Use a 50mm or 85mm natural portrait perspective from a 45-degree three-quarter angle.

Keep her face, raised hand, upper body, waist, and visible dress texture in clear focus.

Leave modest headroom and visual space in front of her gaze.

The background should remain recognizable but softly controlled rather than fully blurred.

Do not crop her wrist, fingers, elbows, or hair unnaturally.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, porcelain-clear skin, large round almond-shaped eyes, subtle double eyelids, a calm and delicate gaze, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark near one eye.

Thin semi-matte cloud skin, rosy beige and soft brown eye color, lightly defined lashes, cool rose blush, and a clear rose-pink glow lip.

No beauty filter, plastic skin, artificial face glow, strong vignette, gray wash, heavy blur, or excessive softness.

## 8) Key Direction Points

Her hand must be anatomically correct with five natural fingers.

Do not let hair cover her eyes, beauty mark, nose, or lips.

Avoid a melancholic expression, closed eyes, dramatic sorrow, fashion-advertisement stiffness, or a distant tiny model.

cuts.title: 유리 피라미드 앞의 푸른 실루엣
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic daylight cinematic fashion portrait inspired by CineStill 50D.

Clean daylight, cool architectural color, crisp but natural glass reflections, refined cinematic tones, fine film grain, restrained contrast, and an orderly modern atmosphere.

The image feels intelligent, calm, airy, and quietly curious rather than cold or sterile.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun stands on a neatly maintained lawn in front of the glass pyramid at Moerenuma Park.

She slowly looks upward toward the highest point of the structure. A compact silver film camera hangs loosely from one hand.

The architecture suggests scale and order, while Jieun’s sky-blue shirt and relaxed posture introduce softness and human curiosity.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

The exterior of the glass pyramid at Moerenuma Park in Sapporo, Hokkaido.

A clear summer morning or late afternoon with a clean blue sky, fresh green lawn, and gentle natural light.

No tourists, signs, bicycles, service vehicles, barriers, litter, or distracting park furniture.

## 4) Background and Props

- Large geometric glass-pyramid facade
- Clean sky reflected in the glass
- Neatly cut light-green lawn
- Minimal pale concrete elements
- Matte-silver compact film camera
- Thin black or gray wrist strap
- No other accessories or props

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing

Vertical 3:4 full-body fashion composition.

Jieun occupies approximately 60% of the image height.

Shoot from slightly below waist level using a natural 35mm–50mm perspective.

Arrange the pyramid’s diagonal lines so they rise behind Jieun without visually cutting through her face.

Include her complete body and both shoes.

The architecture should remain impressive but must not reduce Jieun to a tiny figure.

Keep the image clean, geometric, and balanced with controlled negative space.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, porcelain-clear skin, large round almond-shaped eyes with subtle double eyelids, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark near one eye.

Her long black hair is tied into a loose low ponytail. Thin see-through bangs and delicate face-framing strands remain natural.

Petite, feminine, healthy, and anatomically realistic body proportions.

Outfit:
An oversized sky-blue poplin shirt worn untucked, white tailored pin-tuck shorts, and minimal white sneakers. Sleeves casually rolled above the wrists. Small silver earrings.

Makeup:
A clear cool-neutral base, grayish taupe and soft brown eyes, lavender-pink blush, and rose-beige lips.

Pose:
One foot slightly forward. One hand holds the silver camera loosely below hip level. The opposite hand rests comfortably near the side seam of the shirt.

Gaze:
She looks upward at the architecture.

Expression:
Quiet curiosity with relaxed lips and softly focused eyes.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use bright, clean daylight with soft facial illumination.

Glass reflections should remain precise but not metallic or overprocessed.

Emphasize sky blue, silver, white, pale concrete, and light green.

Maintain realistic skin texture and gentle shadow transitions.

No dark moody grading, heavy teal-orange color, blown glass highlights, HDR, sharp digital clarity, or artificial blue skin.

## 8) Key Direction Points

Balance the model and the architecture rather than making either one visually dominant.

Preserve a recognizable full face in three-quarter profile, complete shoes, realistic camera size, and clean body proportions.

Avoid a towering distorted building, ultra-wide lens deformation, stiff catalog posing, crowded reflections, duplicate people in the glass, or signs and logos.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight.

The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 운하가 보이는 가장 좋은 자리
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic 35mm lifestyle editorial portrait inspired by Kodak Portra 400.

Soft natural window light, muted refined tones, creamy ivory, deep navy, gentle blue-gray water, natural skin color, smooth highlight rolloff, and subtle analog grain.

The mood is elegant, independent, peaceful, and quietly aspirational.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun sits at a minimal café table beside a large window overlooking the Otaru Canal.

After watching the water for a moment, she slowly turns her face toward the camera.

The canal and old stone warehouses reveal the destination, while her face, silk top, and relaxed posture communicate the beauty of traveling alone.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

A bright minimal café overlooking the Otaru Canal on a clear summer afternoon.

Large clean window, calm sparkling water, old stone warehouses, and soft daylight entering the room.

No visible café crowd, staff, menu boards, signage, excessive decoration, parked vehicles, or visual clutter.

## 4) Background and Props

- Otaru Canal visible beside Jieun through the window
- Calm water with restrained sunlight reflections
- Old stone warehouse architecture
- Light-gray or white café interior
- Minimal table and chair
- No drink, sketchbook, phone, handbag, or extra tableware in this cut

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing

Vertical 3:4 thigh-up medium-long portrait.

Jieun occupies approximately 70% of the image height.

Photograph from slightly beside the table using a natural 50mm perspective.

Include part of the table and chair while keeping the canal beside her rather than directly behind her head.

Maintain balanced exposure between her face and the outdoor scenery.

Avoid strong backlighting, silhouette, or a wide room-establishing shot.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, smooth porcelain skin, large round almond-shaped eyes with subtle double eyelids, a calm delicate gaze, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark near one eye.

Long straight black hair worn loose, with one side gently tucked behind her ear. Thin see-through bangs remain light and clear of her eyes.

A pale ivory boat-neck silk sleeveless top, deep navy wide-leg linen trousers, navy or black slingback shoes, and small silver earrings.

Makeup:
Soft semi-glow skin without shine, rosy taupe and muted brown eyes, dusty rose blush, and rose-beige gloss.

Pose:
She sits comfortably rather than rigidly upright. One hand rests lightly on the table and the other rests naturally on her lap.

Gaze:
A gentle look near the camera.

Expression:
A relaxed small smile that feels private and sincere.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use bright natural window light supported by soft reflected fill so her face remains luminous and evenly exposed.

Preserve silk texture, realistic skin pores, deep navy fabric, and gentle water reflections.

No dark face, blown window, orange interior cast, plastic skin, excessive bokeh, heavy vintage fade, or artificial studio glamour.

## 8) Key Direction Points

The image should immediately suggest:

- A desirable solo-travel moment
- A premium but attainable café lifestyle
- Otaru’s canal atmosphere
- Jieun’s quiet confidence and elegance

Keep the face clearly visible. Do not let the window frame, hair, or furniture cut through facial features.

## 9) Watermark

cuts.title: 차가운 잔과 물빛
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic 35mm summer café portrait inspired by Kodak Portra 400.

Soft natural light, muted ivory and navy, calm blue-gray water, gentle skin tones, smooth highlight transitions, visible glass condensation, and subtle fine grain.

The mood is cool, refined, refreshing, and emotionally still.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun holds a thin transparent glass of cold clear summer drink while looking toward the Otaru Canal.

Tiny beads of condensation gather on the glass, visually echoing the cool water outside.

She holds the drink below chest level so her face remains completely visible. The scene captures the moment when summer heat quietly fades.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

A minimal window-side café overlooking the Otaru Canal during a clear summer afternoon.

Bright natural daylight, calm water, and softly visible stone warehouses.

No rain, gray weather, crowded seating, staff, menus, branded cups, excessive décor, or distracting table objects.

## 4) Background and Props

- Thin transparent drinking glass
- Clear chilled birch sap, barley water, or another nearly transparent cold drink
- Transparent ice cubes
- One thin lemon slice
- Fine condensation on the exterior
- Otaru Canal visible behind her shoulder
- Minimal table with no sketchbook in this cut

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing

Vertical 3:4 waist-up medium close portrait.

Jieun occupies approximately 75% of the image height.

Photograph from a 45-degree side angle with a natural 50mm or 85mm perspective.

Keep her face, both eyes, hand, glass, and upper outfit sharply recognizable.

Position the glass below her chest line, away from her mouth and chin.

Allow the canal’s water color to continue gently behind her shoulder.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, porcelain-clear skin, large round almond-shaped eyes with subtle double eyelids, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark near one eye.

Long straight black hair worn down, with one side tucked behind her ear and thin see-through bangs.

Outfit:
Pale ivory boat-neck silk sleeveless top with small silver earrings.

Makeup:
Soft semi-glow skin, rosy taupe eyes, muted brown definition, dusty rose blush, and rose-beige glossy lips.

Pose:
One hand holds the cool glass loosely below chest level. The opposite hand rests comfortably on the table.

Gaze:
She looks toward the canal.

Expression:
A gentle, peaceful smile with open, clearly visible eyes.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use soft side window light and subtle fill on her face.

Reveal natural skin texture, reflective silk, transparent ice, and fine water droplets without harsh commercial-product lighting.

Maintain warm-neutral skin against cool blue-gray canal tones.

No glass covering the face, no drinking pose, no exaggerated condensation, no melting distorted ice, no overexposed window, and no dark facial shadows.

## 8) Key Direction Points

The emotional focus is Jieun’s calm gaze, the coolness of the transparent glass, and the canal light.

Her hand must be delicate and anatomically accurate, with realistic grip pressure.

The glass must remain physically plausible and transparent.

Avoid an advertisement-style product pose, excessively posed fingers, visible brand logos, extra glasses, or an oversized lemon slice.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight.

The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 여행을 그리는 오후
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic 35mm narrative lifestyle photograph inspired by Kodak Portra 400.

Soft window light, muted refined color, gentle ivory and navy, calm canal blues, natural skin, smooth highlights, and subtle analog grain.

The mood is observant, artistic, peaceful, and quietly personal.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun sits at a window-side café table with a sketchbook open before her.

She has been drawing the simple lines of the Otaru Canal. Her pencil pauses above the page as she lifts her gaze toward the real canal outside to check a detail.

The photograph must show her face, upper body, sketchbook, pencil, table, and canal together rather than becoming a close-up of hands.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

A bright minimal café beside the Otaru Canal on a clear summer afternoon.

Soft daylight enters through a large window. Calm water and old stone warehouses remain visible outside.

No café crowd, menu boards, decorative clutter, branded objects, phones, bags, food, or unnecessary tableware.

## 4) Background and Props

- Minimal cream or light-gray table
- Open sketchbook with a simple unfinished canal line drawing
- One natural wooden pencil
- Otaru Canal and stone warehouses through the window
- No drink in this cut
- No eraser, paint, ruler, phone, or additional stationery

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing

Vertical 3:4 knee-up medium-long portrait.

Jieun occupies approximately 65–70% of the image height.

Photograph diagonally from beside the table using a natural 50mm perspective.

The sketchbook should appear naturally along the lower section of the frame, while her face remains the visual focus.

Maintain enough depth of field to recognize both her expression and the open sketchbook.

Avoid a top-down view, close-up hands-only image, or strongly blurred page.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, porcelain-clear skin, large round almond-shaped eyes with subtle double eyelids, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark near one eye.

Long straight black hair worn loose, one side gently tucked behind her ear, with airy see-through bangs.

Outfit:
Pale ivory boat-neck silk sleeveless top, deep navy wide-leg linen trousers, and small silver earrings.

Makeup:
Soft semi-glow skin, rosy taupe and muted brown eyes, dusty rose blush, and rose-beige gloss.

Pose:
She sits in a relaxed posture, leaning only slightly toward the table. One hand holds the pencil lightly above the page while the other steadies the edge of the sketchbook.

Gaze:
Her eyes move from the sketchbook toward the canal.

Expression:
A small, satisfied smile, as though she has just understood the shape she wanted to draw.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use soft window light that evenly illuminates her face and hands.

Preserve silk texture, pencil detail, natural paper grain, and the subdued canal scenery.

No harsh backlight, overexposed page, illegible sketch, artificial face smoothing, deep shadows, excessive vintage yellow, or digital HDR.

## 8) Key Direction Points

The drawing should be simple and believable, not a perfect finished illustration.

Keep her face clearly visible and her posture elegant but natural.

Both hands must be anatomically correct.

Avoid extra pencils, duplicated fingers, unreadable text, printed images in the sketchbook, extreme concentration, hunched posture, or an overly serious expression.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight.

The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 라벤더 언덕의 주인공
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic 35mm summer fashion portrait inspired by Kodak Portra 160.

Fine grain, low contrast, elegant pastel daylight, clean lavender color, soft sage green, cream accents, gentle blue sky, and refined natural skin tone.

The image feels airy, feminine, graceful, and memorable without becoming overly romantic or saturated.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun stands on a narrow path between rows of lavender in Furano.

She wears a minimal raffia hat and turns her upper body slightly toward the camera. One hand rests lightly on the brim.

The lavender field spreads around her, but Jieun’s face, eyes, and pale lavender dress remain the first visual elements noticed.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

A broad lavender hillside in Furano, Hokkaido, during a clear late-summer afternoon.

Bright blue sky, a few soft clouds, distant mountain ridges, warm but gentle sunlight, and a light breeze.

No tourists, signs, buildings, tractors, fences, damaged flowers, picked lavender, or commercial farm equipment.

## 4) Background and Props

- Wide rows of healthy lavender
- Narrow walking path
- Distant mountain ridge
- Clear sky occupying approximately 20% of the frame
- Minimal undecorated natural raffia hat
- No bouquet, bag, camera, basket, or additional accessory

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing

Vertical 3:4 knee-below medium-long portrait.

Jieun occupies approximately 70% of the image height.

Shoot at eye level using a natural 50mm perspective.

Allow lavender to create layered bands below her waist and behind her body.

Keep flowers away from her eyes and mouth.

Maintain clear color separation between her muted pale-lavender dress and the deeper lavender field.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, smooth porcelain skin, large round almond-shaped eyes with subtle double eyelids, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark near one eye.

Her long black hair is styled in a loose low braid or relaxed low tie. Thin see-through bangs and soft face-framing strands remain visible beneath the hat.

Outfit:
A gray-toned pale lavender linen midi dress with a square neckline, slim straight silhouette, neatly shaped waist, and cream low-heeled sandals.

Makeup:
Thin cloud-like skin, lavender-gray and rosy-taupe eyes, cool pink and faint lavender blush, and muted mauve-pink lips.

Pose:
Her upper body turns gently to show the square neckline and waist. One hand lightly touches the raffia hat brim; the other rests naturally along the side of her dress.

Gaze:
A soft look near the camera.

Expression:
A small, elegant smile with visible, relaxed eyes.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use soft late-afternoon sunlight with smooth shadows.

Maintain realistic lavender rather than neon purple.

Preserve clean skin, detailed linen texture, natural hat fibers, and subtle breeze movement.

No orange sunset cast, oversaturated flowers, washed-out sky, extreme haze, plastic skin, heavy blur, or bright commercial color grading.

## 8) Key Direction Points

Jieun must remain the heroine rather than disappearing inside the flower field.

The hat must fit naturally without crushing the bangs or creating a dark shadow over her eyes.

Avoid flowers covering the face, a giant hat, overly glamorous posing, stiff arms, damaged plants, picked flowers, or an exaggerated hourglass silhouette.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight.

The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 라벤더 길을 걷는 오후

cuts.title: 숲을 바라보는 오후
cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic 35mm private-ryokan lifestyle portrait inspired by Kodak Portra 400.

Muted warm-neutral color, soft window light, deep summer-forest green, warm tatami beige, charcoal silk, gentle highlight rolloff, and subtle film grain.

The atmosphere is calm, refined, cool, restorative, and private without feeling dark or melancholic.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun sits comfortably on the tatami floor beside a wide window and looks out toward a dense Hokkaido summer forest.

The room remains visually quiet and minimally furnished. Her complete seated figure, face in profile, window, forest, and tatami texture are all visible in a balanced composition.

The scene represents the first moment of the journey when doing nothing finally feels acceptable.

## 3) Location, Time, and Environment

A private minimal ryokan room in Hokkaido during a clear summer afternoon.

Soft daylight enters through a large clean window. Outside is a deep green forest with no buildings, people, rain, or mist.

The interior feels cool, airy, and comfortable rather than dim or heavily traditional.

## 4) Background and Props

- Natural woven tatami floor
- Wide modern window
- Dense deep-green summer forest
- Low minimal wooden table placed away from her
- No bedding, television, luggage, lanterns, food, tea set, screens, or excessive decoration
- No handheld props in this cut

## 5) Camera Composition and Framing

Vertical 3:4 seated full-body medium-long composition.

Jieun occupies approximately 60% of the image height.

Photograph diagonally across the room using a natural 50mm perspective.

Show her face in a clear side or three-quarter profile, her complete seated body, bare feet, window, forest, and approximately 20–25% open tatami floor.

Keep the room intimate rather than extremely wide.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun, a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, smooth porcelain skin, large round almond-shaped eyes with subtle double eyelids, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark near one eye.

Her long black hair is tied loosely at the nape or draped naturally over one shoulder. Thin see-through bangs and soft loose strands remain visible.

Petite, feminine, healthy, graceful, and anatomically realistic proportions.

Outfit:
A deep-charcoal silk wrap top with a refined kimono-style collar and a matching flowing long skirt. Neat but relaxed waist tie. Bare feet. Minimal or no jewelry.

Makeup:
Natural semi-glow skin, soft brown and gray-brown eyes, warm rose-beige blush, and dried-rose tinted lip balm.

Pose:
She sits with both legs folded comfortably to one side. One hand rests on her knee; the other rests lightly on the tatami beside her.

Gaze:
She looks toward the forest.

Expression:
Relaxed, peaceful, and gently relieved rather than tired, sad, or emotionally distant.

## 7) Lighting, Color, and Atmosphere

Use soft window light across her face and silk outfit.

The interior must remain bright enough to reveal facial details, tatami texture, folds of silk, and bare feet.

Balance cool forest green with warm neutral tatami and deep charcoal.

No dark room, underexposure, yellow-orange lighting, dramatic sunbeams, heavy shadows, fog outside, or artificial luxury décor.

## 8) Key Direction Points

Negative space should come from clean tatami and an uncluttered window, not from making Jieun tiny.

Her face must remain recognizable in profile.

Ensure anatomically correct folded legs and natural bare feet.

Avoid kneeling seiza discomfort, ceremonial posing, traditional geisha styling, cluttered ryokan props, sad expression, or an oversized empty room.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image.

Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight.

The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.title: 책 속에 멈춘 오후

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic analog cinematic environmental portrait photographed on genuine Kodak Portra 400 120 color-negative film with a medium-format camera and professionally scanned through a Noritsu HS-1800 lab scanner.

Kodak Portra 400 unmistakably shapes the entire photograph through softly visible organic grain, warm-neutral Korean skin, restrained deep navy, muted sand beige, rich dark oak brown, low contrast, smooth highlight rolloff, open shadow detail, and gently compressed midtones. Expose at approximately EI 320 for a slightly dense negative that preserves the cream-colored book pages, dark navy knit texture, black hair, polished wood, rain-darkened window, and shadowed bookshelves without digital HDR clarity.

Use softened analog edge acuity, restrained micro-contrast, subtle color-density variation, and a slightly warm Noritsu scan density without orange or yellow color cast. The mood is private, contemplative, and emotionally spacious. The rainy afternoon creates comfortable solitude rather than tragic loneliness.

Avoid orange skin, yellow wood, dramatic spotlighting, glossy commercial sharpness, crushed bookshelf shadows, excessive background blur, oversized grain, artificial dust, light leaks, plastic skin, theatrical sadness, or polished luxury-library advertising.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Inside the old library of a northern German manor, Jieun has stopped reading without deliberately deciding to stop. An open faded hardcover book rests across her knees. One hand remains quietly on the page, while the fingers of her other hand slowly move across a worn brown leather bookmark.

Her gaze has drifted slightly beyond the printed sentence, as though a quiet thought has interrupted the act of reading. The tall shelves, dark oak walls, and steady summer rain create a small private world in which she does not need to explain what she is feeling.

## 3) Location, Time and Environment

A historic manor library during a cloudy summer afternoon. Dark oak bookshelves rise along the left side of the room, while a broad section of wooden wall paneling remains intentionally empty. A tall window behind the left side of Jieun is covered with fine rain trails, and the garden outside appears only as a muted gray-green presence.

The room feels cool, still, and faintly damp, without candlelight, fireplace glow, or bright artificial lamps.

## 4) Background and Props

A worn dark leather reading chair, an antique wooden desk with large empty areas, several faded clothbound and leather-bound books, one open cream-paged hardcover book, and a narrow brown leather bookmark. The props remain sparse and naturally aged.

The book supports Jieun’s action but never becomes the dominant subject. Her profile, eyes, and paused hand should be noticed before the viewer studies the pages.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 composition with a natural 50mm-equivalent perspective. The camera sits only slightly above Jieun’s eye level and observes her from a gentle front-side angle. Jieun sits in the lower-right third of the frame and is visible from the top of her head to just below her knees.

The tall bookshelf and a generous stretch of empty wooden wall fill most of the left side and upper frame, allowing the architecture and negative space to communicate silence. Her face, resting hand, and leather bookmark form a subtle diagonal.

Use moderate depth of field that gently softens the distant books while retaining their recognizable shapes and wood texture. Jieun does not look toward the camera; her gaze rests somewhere slightly beyond the open book.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun is a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, smooth porcelain skin with natural pores, large round almond-shaped dark brown eyes with subtle double eyelids, a calm innocent and slightly melancholic gaze, a slim straight nose, softly blurred pink gradient lips, and a small delicate beauty mark near one eye.

She has long straight black hair with natural volume and thin airy see-through bangs. A few fine strands rest naturally near her cheek without hiding her eyes or beauty mark. She has a petite, healthy, and realistically proportioned Korean feminine figure with delicate body lines and anatomically natural posture.

She wears a deep navy boat-neck knit top, sand-beige straight trousers, and minimal dark brown loafers, with no necklace or large earrings. Her makeup uses softly matte bloom skin, restrained cloud-like luminosity beneath the eyes and high on the cheeks, diffused dusty-rose blush, low-saturation brown and rose-beige eye shading, a nearly invisible transparent opal accent at the inner corners, and softly blurred rose-mauve lips.

Her lips remain gently closed. Her back stays naturally upright without becoming rigid, while her shoulders and fingers remain completely relaxed.

## 7) Lighting, Color and Atmosphere

Soft overcast daylight enters from the rear-left window and passes through the rain-streaked glass. The light creates a gentle side plane across Jieun’s cheek and nose while keeping her expression readable.

A restrained neutral bounce from the camera side prevents her dark eyes from disappearing, while subtle negative fill on the opposite side creates separation between her face and the dark oak interior. The book pages retain creamy paper fibers instead of becoming blown white. The deep navy knit remains visibly blue, and her black hair retains separated strands without glossy digital shine.

## 8) Key Direction

The emotion should be visible through the page that has not been turned, the fingers lingering on the leather bookmark, Jieun’s gaze resting beyond the text, and the large untouched space surrounding her. The photograph should feel like a genuine medium-format frame from a quiet analog photo essay, not a posed library fashion campaign.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

A compact historic greenhouse in the garden of an old northern German manor during a brightening cloudy afternoon. The greenhouse has weathered wooden framing, aged transparent glass, lingering droplets on the roof, naturally arranged ferns, and several broad-leaf plants.

The air feels cool and moist. The rain outside has become softer, allowing more diffused daylight to enter from above.

## 4) Background and Props

A modest wooden table and chair, one cream-colored sketchbook, and a fountain pen with a small silver nib and dark wooden barrel. Ferns and broad leaves appear naturally around the greenhouse edges.

The drawing remains simple, indistinct, and unreadable. The table stays mostly clear. Do not include paint palettes, coffee cups, flower bouquets, elaborate art tools, stacks of paper, or decorative clutter.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 medium portrait using a natural 65mm-equivalent perspective. The camera stands approximately 30 degrees to one side of the table. Jieun’s upper body, drawing hand, fountain pen, and part of the sketchbook remain visible in one frame.

Her face and pen create a gentle diagonal. Primary focus rests near her eye, while the hand and pen remain clearly readable. The wooden greenhouse frames and plant stems rise calmly behind her without crossing or surrounding her face.

Include a restrained amount of glass roof and empty space in the upper frame. Jieun looks toward the pen tip rather than toward the camera.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun is a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, smooth porcelain skin with realistic fine texture, large round almond-shaped dark brown eyes with subtle double eyelids, a calm innocent and slightly wistful gaze, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small delicate beauty mark near one eye.

Her long straight black hair has natural volume and thin see-through bangs. A few fine strands settle near her cheek without hiding the eye or beauty mark. She has a petite, healthy, graceful, and naturally proportioned Korean feminine figure.

She wears a sand-white linen blazer over a cream sleeveless top, black slim straight denim, and dark brown flat shoes. The sleeveless top has a neat modest neckline and remains covered by the structured blazer.

Her makeup uses softly matte bloom skin, diffused peach-milk or dusty-rose blush, low-saturation brown and rose-beige eye shading, a nearly invisible opal accent near the inner eye, and softly blurred rose-mauve lips.

She holds the pen lightly rather than gripping it. Her wrist rests naturally, her shoulders remain lowered, and her expression shows calm immersion rather than intense concentration.

## 7) Lighting, Color and Atmosphere

Cloudy daylight filters through the droplet-covered greenhouse roof as a broad softened top light. The cream sketchbook naturally reflects a small amount of warm-neutral light toward Jieun’s face, opening the shadows beneath her eyes and chin.

A restrained negative fill on the far side separates her pale blazer from the surrounding glass and leaves. Highlights on the blazer and roof remain fully detailed, while neutral fill prevents green reflections from contaminating her jaw and neck.

## 8) Key Direction

The emotional evidence should come from the light grip of the pen, small unfinished line, Jieun’s lowered attentive gaze, and rain droplets resting above her. The image should feel like an authentic Portra 160 daylight photograph from a quiet personal photo essay, not an artist-brand campaign.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic intimate cinematic portrait photographed on genuine Kodak Vision3 500T 35mm motion-picture film, processed through authentic ECN-2 chemistry and scanned directly from the original camera negative with restrained natural color grading.

Kodak Vision3 500T controls the complete image through fine motion-picture grain, wide exposure latitude, open low-light shadows, natural Korean skin, restrained French blue, deep navy, dark walnut brown, and one small controlled brass highlight.

Rate the film at approximately EI 400 to preserve Jieun’s eye, lips, beauty mark, black hair, silk texture, fingertips, dark console, and worn brass surface without digitally brightening the room. Use softened cinematic edge acuity, restrained micro-contrast, natural highlight compression, and subtle low-light color separation.

Cool natural window light and one weak warm practical source coexist without teal-and-orange exaggeration. The brass remains tactile and physically reflective rather than glowing like gold.

Avoid product advertising, oversized brass object, golden bloom, CineStill-style red halation, orange skin, crushed black backgrounds, missing or fully blurred face, isolated-hand macro photography, strong bokeh circles, jewelry-commercial posing, or digitally polished metal.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun stands before a dark walnut console inside the manor lobby. A small aged brass paperweight rests beneath her fingertips. She does not lift, rotate, or examine it closely. She simply lets the soft pads of her fingers feel its cool worn surface.

Her gaze rests slightly beyond her hand, as though the tactile sensation has slowed her thoughts without pulling her completely into a memory. Her eye, beauty mark, jawline, lips, and French-blue blouse remain present behind the foreground action.

## 3) Location, Time and Environment

A quiet corner of the manor lobby after the rain. A high arched window supplies cool natural light, while a small shaded lamp near the console adds only enough warmth to reveal the walnut grain and brass surface.

The lobby remains low in brightness, spacious, and free of other people.

## 4) Background and Props

A dark walnut console with a mostly empty surface, one small aged brass paperweight, and a restrained low-output practical lamp. The paperweight has a simple classic form and slightly worn surface, with no readable text, logo, engraving, or elaborate ornament.

Do not include a vase, wall mirror, clock, picture frames, flowers, books, or a collection of decorative objects.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 close bust portrait using an 85mm-equivalent cinema lens. Jieun’s hand and the brass object occupy the lower foreground, while her French-blue blouse, jawline, softly closed lips, beauty mark, and eye remain visible behind them.

Her face is never completely blurred, cropped away, or hidden. Focus rests slightly closer to Jieun’s nearest eye while her fingertips and brass remain clearly understandable.

The small object stays below her face and away from the center of the frame, preventing a product-advertisement composition. Jieun looks slightly beyond her hand rather than directly at the object or toward the camera.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun is a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, smooth fair porcelain skin with realistic texture, large round almond-shaped dark brown eyes with subtle double eyelids, a calm innocent and slightly melancholic gaze, a slim straight nose, soft pink gradient lips, and a small beauty mark near one eye.

Her long straight black hair has natural volume and thin see-through bangs. A few strands fall softly beside her cheek. She has a petite, healthy, graceful, and anatomically natural Korean feminine figure.

She wears a French-blue silk blouse with restrained sheen and a deep navy linen midi skirt. Her makeup uses softly matte bloom skin, diffused dusty-rose blush, muted brown and rose-beige eyes, minimal transparent opal shimmer, and soft rose-mauve hybrid lips.

Her fingers remain naturally curved instead of perfectly spread. Her lips are softly closed, and calm breathing is suggested through her relaxed jaw and lowered shoulders.

## 7) Lighting, Color and Atmosphere

Cool arched-window light remains the main illumination across Jieun’s face and blouse. A small warm lamp creates one narrow restrained highlight on the brass. A tiny amount of warm reflected light reaches beneath her chin and along her neck without changing her overall skin tone.

The French-blue silk retains controlled highlights and visible fabric texture. The walnut remains deep brown with readable wood grain. Shadow areas stay open through the broad latitude of Vision3 500T. No visible red halation surrounds the lamp.

## 8) Key Direction

The frame should connect the small tactile action with Jieun’s quiet face. The worn brass surface, gently curved fingers, slightly distant gaze, and relaxed mouth provide physical evidence of a moment in which time has slowed. The image should resemble a subtle close shot from a genuine motion-picture negative, not a luxury object campaign.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.

cuts.prompt:
## 1) Photo Style and Mood

An ultra-realistic final cinematic film still photographed on genuine Kodak Vision3 500T 35mm motion-picture film, processed through authentic ECN-2 chemistry and scanned directly from the original camera negative with a restrained natural cinematic grade.

Kodak Vision3 500T unmistakably defines the complete frame through fine authentic motion-picture grain, broad dynamic range, softly open architectural shadows, natural Korean skin, restrained French blue, deep navy, cool stone gray, dark walnut, and extremely subtle warm interior depth.

Rate the film at approximately EI 400 to create a dense but readable negative that preserves Jieun’s facial identity, black hair, silk texture, navy linen, stone walls, arched doorway, and empty floor. Use softened analog edge acuity, restrained micro-contrast, gentle highlight compression, subtle motion-picture color separation, and naturally open shadows.

Cool post-rain daylight remains dominant. Weak warm practical light appears only in the deepest background and never creates orange skin, teal-and-orange grading, or red CineStill-style halation. The final frame feels calm, clear, and emotionally open rather than dramatically conclusive.

Avoid theatrical spotlighting, dark vignette, silhouette, crying, illuminated symbolic doorway, strong cyan color, orange practical lights, heavy halation, perfect digital sharpness, triumphant posing, hidden facial features, or centered fashion-campaign symmetry.

## 2) Scene Concept and Story

Jieun stands quietly inside one side of a large arched doorway in the old manor lobby. She is not dramatically leaving and not waiting for someone to arrive. She simply pauses within the architecture after the rain, carrying less tension in her body than before.

One arm hangs naturally beside her. The fingers of her other hand touch the edge of her silk blouse sleeve without gripping it. Her gaze lowers toward the empty floor ahead. The smallest softness appears at the corners of her mouth, suggesting that the silence around her has become clean rather than heavy.

## 3) Location, Time and Environment

The main lobby of a historic northern German manor immediately after the summer rain has ended. A large arched doorway, broad cool stone walls, dark wooden trim, and expansive empty floor define the interior.

Cold natural light enters from unseen arched windows. The air feels clear, still, and slightly cool. No visible rain, fog, smoke, or artificial atmospheric haze remains.

## 4) Background and Props

A large stone arch, old textured wall, subtle dark wooden trim, distant walnut console, and mostly empty stone floor. The architecture feels old and tactile but never ruined, gothic, or threatening.

Do not include luggage, flowers, chairs, mirrors, chandeliers, statues, open glowing exterior doors, or symbolic decorative objects.

## 5) Camera Angle and Composition

Vertical 3:4 static full-body composition using a natural 45–50mm-equivalent cinema lens. The camera remains perfectly level, preserving accurate vertical and horizontal architectural lines.

Jieun occupies only approximately 20–25% of the frame and stands off center within one side of the arch. A broad area of empty floor extends in front of her. Generous negative space remains above her head inside the arch.

The background stays softly detailed rather than fully blurred. Jieun’s face remains recognizable in a lowered three-quarter angle. Avoid extreme perspective, low-angle leg elongation, high-angle diminishment, or perfectly centered fashion symmetry.

## 6) Model Expression

Jieun is a beautiful young Korean woman with a small V-line face, smooth porcelain skin with natural fine texture, large round almond-shaped dark brown eyes with subtle double eyelids, a calm innocent and slightly wistful gaze, a slim straight nose, softly blurred pink gradient lips, and a small delicate beauty mark near one eye.

Her long straight black hair has natural volume and thin airy see-through bangs. Her hair falls quietly without dramatic motion or glossy artificial styling. She has a petite, healthy, graceful, and anatomically realistic Korean feminine figure.

She wears a French-blue silk blouse with controlled soft sheen, a deep navy linen midi skirt, and black or dark brown flat shoes. Her makeup remains restrained: softly matte bloom skin, diffused dusty-rose blush, muted rose-beige and brown eye shading, no hard eyeliner, a nearly invisible transparent opal detail, and softly blurred rose-mauve lips.

Her head inclines slightly. Her eyes look toward the empty floor immediately ahead. One arm hangs naturally while the other hand touches the sleeve edge without gripping it. Her shoulders and fingers appear visibly relaxed. Only the faintest comfort appears around her lips.

## 7) Lighting, Color and Atmosphere

Cool post-rain daylight enters broadly from the manor windows and spreads evenly throughout the lobby. Soft negative fill from both outer sides creates gentle separation between Jieun and the arch without isolating her.

An extremely subtle neutral front bounce keeps her eyes, beauty mark, lips, and facial shape recognizable. The light never isolates her through a dramatic spot. The walls, floor, arch, and figure remain connected within one quiet tonal field.

Vision3 grain remains naturally integrated through skin, silk, stone, hair, wood, and shadow.

## 8) Key Direction

The conclusion is expressed through absence rather than achievement. The empty floor, generous arch space, lowered gaze, released shoulders, relaxed hand, and nearly invisible softness at the corners of Jieun’s mouth show that the original solitude still exists but no longer weighs on her.

The photograph should feel like the final quiet frame of a restrained European character film, leaving silence after the image rather than delivering a dramatic ending.

## 9) Watermark

Add a small subtle watermark text “ⓒyulim_mood” in the bottom-right corner of the image. Use Helvetica Neue font, thin or light weight. The watermark should be white, semi-transparent, clean, minimal, and softly blended into the photo.
